name: Official Notice
description: For drafting official notices and announcements
content: <uos-ai-prompt-template>Please help me draft an official notice regarding {{subject}} issued by {{organization}}</uos-ai-prompt-template>

name: Meeting Minutes
content: <uos-ai-prompt-template>Please help me write [[this|last]] meeting minutes for {{meeting topic}}, attendees include {{attendees}}</uos-ai-prompt-template>

name: Request Report
description: Formal request document submitted to superiors
content: <uos-ai-prompt-template>Please help me write a request report regarding {{request matter}} from {{organization}}</uos-ai-prompt-template>

name: Product Promotion
content: <uos-ai-prompt-template>Please write a [[social media|blog|newsletter]] promotional copy for {{product name}}, highlighting {{key selling points}}</uos-ai-prompt-template>

name: Event Planning
content: <uos-ai-prompt-template>Please help me plan a {{event theme}} event, scheduled for {{date}}, with an expected attendance of {{number}} people</uos-ai-prompt-template>

name: Weekly Report
description: Weekly work summary and plan template
content: <uos-ai-prompt-template>Please help me write a [[this week|last week]] work report. Main tasks completed: {{completed tasks}}. Plan for next week: {{next week plan}}</uos-ai-prompt-template>

name: Work Summary
description: Monthly or annual work summary report
content: <uos-ai-prompt-template>Please help me write a [[monthly|quarterly|annual]] work summary. Key achievements: {{achievements}}. Areas for improvement: {{improvements}}</uos-ai-prompt-template>

name: Project Management
description: Project progress tracking and risk management
content: <uos-ai-prompt-template>Please help me write a progress report for {{project name}}. Current progress: {{current progress}}. Risk factors: {{risks}}</uos-ai-prompt-template>

name: Market Analysis
description: Industry market research and analysis report
content: <uos-ai-prompt-template>Please write a market analysis report for {{industry/product}}, focusing on [[market size|competitive landscape|user needs|development trends]]</uos-ai-prompt-template>

name: Technical Document
content: <uos-ai-prompt-template>Please help me write technical documentation for {{system/module name}}, covering [[API reference|system architecture|deployment guide|user guide]]</uos-ai-prompt-template>

name: Requirements Analysis
content: <uos-ai-prompt-template>Please help me write a PRD for {{feature/product name}}. Background: {{context}}. Target users: {{target users}}</uos-ai-prompt-template>
